title: English Teacher, Middle School (2026-2027)
summary: Implement the district instructional program in middle school English. Design effective standards-aligned lessons, monitor student performance with formative and summative assessments, and participate in professional learning communities.
required_education: Bachelor's degree from an accredited college or university
required_credentials: Valid Texas teaching certificate with required endorsements for English / ELA at the level assigned
preferred_experience: At least one year of student teaching or approved internship
responsibilities: Teach in accordance with staff assignment using effective practices.
Design lessons with immediate and long-range goals and real-world relevance.
Monitor performance using formative and summative assessments; analyze data.
Participate in professional learning communities and use technology to enhance instruction.
Maintain accurate gradebook and attendance records.
rubric_hints: Texas English / ELA certification for the level assigned
